query:
SELECT b.id as book_id, b.title, b.category, p.page_number, p.illustration_url, p.comic_panel1_url, p.comic_panel2_url, p.comic_panel3_url
FROM books b
JOIN pages p ON p.book_id = b.id
WHERE b.id IN (60002, 60003, 60004)
ORDER BY b.id, p.page_number;
